transcription.text: When you set your sights on satisfaction, satisfy yourself with the top tobacco taste, the air-softened mildness of Chesterfield King. When you come to King for mildness, length alone is not enough. Get the king that air-softens every satisfying puff, Chesterfield King. Chesterfield King, for a cooler, smoother smoke that's mild. Yes, satisfy yourself. Get Chesterfield King.
